data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve available climate datasets with filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of climate datasets available through CDO. Supports filtering by dataset ID, data category, data type, location category, location, station, and date range. Returns a DatasetListResponse containing dataset metadata including ID, name, description, and temporal coverage. Useful for discovering which datasets contain the climate observations you need.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and description is missing entirely. Added context about pagination, filtering capabilities, return structure, and use case to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what parameters are available.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve observed climate and weather data values
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves observed climate and weather data values from the CDO datasets. This is the primary operation for accessing actual measurement data such as temperature, precipitation, and other meteorological observations. Requires filtering parameters including dataset ID, data type ID, station ID or location ID, and date range. Supports pagination for large result sets. Returns a DataListResponse containing an array of DataRecord objects with measurement values, dates, and attributes. Use this operation to fetch historical or recent climate observations for analysis.
